news.title:
ICICI Bank executed an NSE block trade of ~468,392 shares worth Rs. 60.1 crore.
The trade was conducted at Rs. 1,283 per share.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank executed an NSE block trade of ~468,392 shares worth Rs. 60.1 crore.
The trade was conducted at Rs. 1,283 per share.

news.title:
HDFC Bank ranks third among private lenders in large defaulter exposure, with dues of Rs 54,315 crore as of Feb 2026.
HDFC Bank's cautious lending keeps its exposure lower than ICICI Bank's Rs 2.78 lakh crore and Axis Bank's Rs 66,338 crore.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank ranks third among private lenders in large defaulter exposure, with dues of Rs 54,315 crore as of Feb 2026.
HDFC Bank's cautious lending keeps its exposure lower than ICICI Bank's Rs 2.78 lakh crore and Axis Bank's Rs 66,338 crore.

news.title:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.

news.title:
Nomura sees limited upside for PSU banks, prefers private banks like Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank due to favorable valuations.
PSU banks' rally driven by cyclical factors; private banks offer stronger earnings visibility, trading below historical valuation levels.
news.summary:
Nomura sees limited upside for PSU banks, prefers private banks like Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank due to favorable valuations.
PSU banks' rally driven by cyclical factors; private banks offer stronger earnings visibility, trading below historical valuation levels.

news.title:
BofA sees upside in Indian bank stocks due to attractive valuations, with HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank trading below historical averages.
IT sector faces short-term AI disruption, despite rupee-driven rally; BofA rates banks 'Overweight' and IT 'Underweight'.
news.summary:
BofA sees upside in Indian bank stocks due to attractive valuations, with HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank trading below historical averages.
IT sector faces short-term AI disruption, despite rupee-driven rally; BofA rates banks 'Overweight' and IT 'Underweight'.

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.

news.title:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.
Key stocks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, and Axis Bank may benefit; RBI expected to hold rates at 5.25%.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.
Key stocks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, and Axis Bank may benefit; RBI expected to hold rates at 5.25%.

news.title:
BofA Securities remains bullish on ICICI Bank and HDFC Bank despite cutting target prices.
SBI has been upgraded to a 'Buy' rating by BofA Securities.
news.summary:
BofA Securities remains bullish on ICICI Bank and HDFC Bank despite cutting target prices.
SBI has been upgraded to a 'Buy' rating by BofA Securities.

news.title:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.
news.summary:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.

news.title:
Brokerages target ICICI Bank, Hindalco, Godrej Consumer, DMart, IndiGo; offer sector insights.
Jefferies flags ICICI Lombard risks; BofA upgrades DMart; Citi reiterates Godrej Consumer Buy rating.
news.summary:
Brokerages target ICICI Bank, Hindalco, Godrej Consumer, DMart, IndiGo; offer sector insights.
Jefferies flags ICICI Lombard risks; BofA upgrades DMart; Citi reiterates Godrej Consumer Buy rating.

news.title:
Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.
Private banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank are better positioned due to stronger fundamentals.
news.summary:
Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.
Private banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank are better positioned due to stronger fundamentals.

news.title:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.
news.summary:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.

news.title:
ICICI Bank downgrades India's FY27 GDP growth forecast to 6.8-6.9%.
Revision cites energy disruptions, global oil prices, and supply chain blockades.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank downgrades India's FY27 GDP growth forecast to 6.8-6.9%.
Revision cites energy disruptions, global oil prices, and supply chain blockades.

news.title:
SBI Trustee released pledged shares of HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank held as security for Sky Gold.
HDFC Bank's 2,52,356 shares and ICICI Bank's 2,12,101 shares, previously encumbered, are now fully released.
news.summary:
SBI Trustee released pledged shares of HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank held as security for Sky Gold.
HDFC Bank's 2,52,356 shares and ICICI Bank's 2,12,101 shares, previously encumbered, are now fully released.

news.title:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.
news.summary:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.

news.title:
ICICI Bank completes transfer of investment management rights to a new company.
The transfer impacts multiple AIFs and is effective from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank completes transfer of investment management rights to a new company.
The transfer impacts multiple AIFs and is effective from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
ICICI Bank uncovered a Rs 23 crore gold loan scam involving fake gold deposits across nine Nagpur branches.
The scam was detected during an internal audit; Dhantoli police have initiated a fraud investigation.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank uncovered a Rs 23 crore gold loan scam involving fake gold deposits across nine Nagpur branches.
The scam was detected during an internal audit; Dhantoli police have initiated a fraud investigation.
